# hardcoded-text-baseline.txt — pre-existing hardcoded-user-text debt
# (android-material3-redesign task 2.6). Grandfathered so the gate can be
# enforced from S2 onward without blocking on the full S13 audit/fix.
# Regenerate ONLY when intentionally accepting new legacy debt — never to
# hide a violation introduced by redesign work.
#
# Entries are JSON Lines: {"path":"...","literal":"..."}. Matching is
# (path, literal-content), NOT (path, line) — an unrelated edit above an
# entry that shifts its line number does NOT re-break the baseline.
# Generated by: node scripts/check-hardcoded-text.mjs --update-baseline
# reason: Compose animation-inspector debug labels (animateFloatAsState/
# animateColorAsState/animateDpAsState label= params) — not user-facing text.
# Verified S13 Wave a2 (CopyPaste-myh8.13).
